scrape_metadata.notes: Full parallel session program extracted from PDF (19 pages). Two parallel session slots on Jan 9: 9:10-10:30 (6 sessions) and 12:00-13:20 (6 sessions). Total: 1 keynote + 12 parallel sessions, 45 papers, 86 participants.
